reason: Verified that the agent can successfully use browser tools to navigate to example.com and retrieve the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Gamut application homepage with sidebar showing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260717-163122-h1xg" agent in the sidebar - Successfully opened the agent's chat interface
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message was successfully sent to the agent
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent completed the task in approximately 13 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - CONFIRMED: Response displays "The page title is \"Example Domain\"" and "The page loaded successfully and its title is \"Example Domain\". Browser closed."
Took screenshot documenting the final result - Screenshot captured showing the complete chat conversation with the agent's successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
